Text: 変身キャラクター選択

Proceed and your <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>fixed party<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> save data will be converted to <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>matched party<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> save data.

Matched party save data still allows for the creation of preformed parties as long as the party is formed before returning to the deep dungeon, and the progression of all members is identical. Any open party slots will be filled automatically via the matching system.

<UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>All special items (pomanders) will be lost upon data conversion.<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>

<UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Scores will not be recorded for matched parties.<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>

<If(GreaterThan(IntegerParameter(1),0))><Else/><UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Save data that has progressed to levels which require a fixed party cannot be converted to matched party save data.<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>

</If><UIForeground>F201FC</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FD</UIGlow>※Converted data cannot be restored to its original state.<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>

Proceed and your <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>fixed party<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> save data will be converted to <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>matched party<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> save data.

Matched party save data still allows for the creation of preformed parties as long as the party is formed before returning to the deep dungeon, and the progression of all members is identical. Any open party slots will be filled automatically via the matching system.

<UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>All special items will be lost upon data conversion.<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>

<UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Scores will not be recorded for matched parties.<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>

<If(GreaterThan(IntegerParameter(1),0))><Else/><UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Save data that has progressed to <Switch(IntegerParameter(2))><Case(1)>floors</Case><Case(2)>floors</Case><Case(3)>areas</Case></Switch> which require a fixed party cannot be converted to matched party save data.<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>

</If><UIForeground>F201FC</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FD</UIGlow>※Converted data cannot be restored to its original state.<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>

Proceed and your save data will be deleted, allowing you reentry to the deep dungeon from floor 1.

Floor progression and character level will be reset, but aetherpool arm and gear strength will remain unchanged.

<UIForeground>F201FC</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FD</UIGlow>※Data cannot be restored once deleted.<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>

Proceed and your save data will be deleted, allowing you reentry to the deep dungeon from <Switch(IntegerParameter(3))><Case(1)>floor</Case><Case(2)>floor</Case><Case(3)>traverse stone</Case></Switch> 1.

Dungeon progression and character level will be reset, but aetherpool arm and gear strength will remain unchanged.

<UIForeground>F201FC</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FD</UIGlow>※Data cannot be restored once deleted.<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>
These floors are only available when party KO count is at zero.
These <Switch(IntegerParameter(1))><Case(1)>floors</Case><Case(2)>floors</Case><Case(3)>areas</Case></Switch> are only available when party KO count is at zero.
You detect the call of the Accursed Hoard on this floor.
You detect the call of the Accursed Hoard.

You are not starting from floor 1. 
Progress will not count towards solo completion achievements.

You are not starting from <Switch(IntegerParameter(1))><Case(1)>floor 1</Case><Case(2)>floor 1</Case><Case(3)>traverse stone 1</Case></Switch>. 
Progress will not count towards solo completion achievements.
